name: hcportal_updateKennelHasher
description: Updates a hasher's profile and kennel-specific settings for a given kennel. Allows editing of personal details (name, email, hash name), discount settings, membership status, notification preferences, historical run counts, and historical count estimates. The SP determines which fields to update based on which parameters are non-NULL. All writes are wrapped in a single transaction.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with @hasherBeingEditedPublicId as the paramString.

parameters.name: hasherBeingEditedPublicId
parameters.description: Public hasher ID of the user being edited. Required. Also used as the paramString for auth token validation.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Public kennel ID for the kennel context. Required for all kennel-specific updates.

parameters.name: firstName
parameters.description: User's first name. If non-NULL, updates Hasher.FirstName. Widened from NVARCHAR(150) in HC5 to match table column.

parameters.name: lastName
parameters.description: User's last name. If non-NULL, updates Hasher.LastName. Widened from NVARCHAR(150) in HC5 to match table column.

parameters.name: eMail
parameters.description: User's email address. If non-NULL, updates Hasher.Email.

parameters.name: hashName
parameters.description: User's hash name. If non-NULL, updates Hasher.HashName.

parameters.name: isMember
parameters.description: String value controlling membership status. If 'yes' (case-insensitive), sets HasherKennelMap.MembershipExpirationDate to the sentinel date '2999-12-31' (never expires). Otherwise sets it to yesterday. Evaluated together with @status in a single IF block.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: String value controlling membership status. If 'member' (case-insensitive), sets HasherKennelMap.MembershipExpirationDate to the sentinel date '2999-12-31' (never expires). Otherwise sets it to yesterday. Evaluated together with @isMember in a single IF block.

parameters.name: emailAlerts
parameters.description: String value ('on', 'off', 'auto') to set email alert preference. Maps to HasherKennelMap.KennelEmailAlertPreference: 'on'=1, 'off'=2, 'auto'=0.

parameters.name: notifications
parameters.description: String value ('on', 'off', 'auto') to set push notification preference. Maps to HasherKennelMap.KennelNotificationPreference: 'on'=1, 'off'=2, 'auto'=0.

parameters.name: discountPercent
parameters.description: Discount percentage for the hasher in this kennel. If non-NULL, updates HasherKennelMap.DiscountPercent.

parameters.name: discountAmount
parameters.description: Discount fixed amount for the hasher in this kennel. If non-NULL, updates HasherKennelMap.DiscountAmount.

parameters.name: discountDescription
parameters.description: Description of the discount. If non-NULL, updates HasherKennelMap.DiscountDescription.

parameters.name: historicTotalRuns
parameters.description: String representation of historical total run count. If non-NULL and numeric (via ISNUMERIC), updates HasherKennelMap.HistoricalTotalRunCount, calls HC.nonApi_updateRunCountsByUser, and returns HistoricalRunCountUpdate rowset.

parameters.name: historicHaring
parameters.description: String representation of historical haring count. If non-NULL and numeric (via ISNUMERIC), updates HasherKennelMap.HistoricalHaringCount, calls HC.nonApi_updateRunCountsByUser, and returns HistoricalRunCountUpdate rowset.

parameters.name: historicCountsAreEstimates
parameters.description: String value ('yes' or 'no') indicating if historical counts are estimates. Maps to HasherKennelMap.HistoricalCountIsEstimate: 'yes'=1, 'no'=0.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: HistoricalRunCountUpdate
rowsets.description: Returned when @historicTotalRuns is successfully updated. Contains updated run count values from HasherKennelMap. Not returned if @historicTotalRuns is NULL or non-numeric.

columns.name: HistoricalTotalRunCount
columns.description: Historical total run count from HasherKennelMap (just updated)

columns.name: HcTotalRunCount
columns.description: HC system-calculated total run count (recalculated by nonApi_updateRunCountsByUser)

columns.name: hasherBeingEditedId
columns.description: Public hasher ID of the user being edited (echo of @hasherBeingEditedPublicId parameter)

columns.name: publicHasherId
columns.description: Public hasher ID of the user performing the update (echo of @publicHasherId parameter)

rowsets.name: HistoricalHaringUpdate
rowsets.description: Returned when @historicHaring is successfully updated. Contains updated run count values from HasherKennelMap. Not returned if @historicHaring is NULL or non-numeric. HC6 re-enabled HC.nonApi_updateRunCountsByUser for haring updates (was commented out in HC5).

columns.name: HistoricalHaringCount
columns.description: Historical haring count from HasherKennelMap (just updated)

columns.name: HistoricalTotalRunCount
columns.description: Historical total run count from HasherKennelMap

columns.name: HcTotalRunCount
columns.description: HC system-calculated total run count (recalculated by nonApi_updateRunCountsByUser)

columns.name: hasherBeingEditedId
columns.description: Public hasher ID of the user being edited (echo of @hasherBeingEditedPublicId parameter)

columns.name: publicHasherId
columns.description: Public hasher ID of the user performing the update (echo of @publicHasherId parameter)

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.Hasher (Email, FirstName, LastName, HashName, updatedAt) if any of those parameters are non-NULL
UPDATE HC.HasherKennelMap (DiscountAmount, DiscountPercent, DiscountDescription, updatedAt) if any discount parameters are non-NULL

UPDATE HC.HasherKennelMap (MembershipExpirationDate, Following, updatedAt) if @isMember or @status are non-NULL. Sentinel: '2999-12-31' = never expires; yesterday = not a member. Following always set to 1 on membership update.
UPDATE HC.HasherKennelMap (KennelNotificationPreference, KennelEmailAlertPreference, updatedAt) if @emailAlerts or @notifications are non-NULL
UPDATE HC.HasherKennelMap (HistoricalCountIsEstimate, updatedAt) if @historicCountsAreEstimates is non-NULL
UPDATE HC.HasherKennelMap (HistoricalTotalRunCount, updatedAt) if @historicTotalRuns is non-NULL and numeric
UPDATE HC.HasherKennelMap (HistoricalHaringCount, updatedAt) if @historicHaring is non-NULL and numeric
EXEC HC.nonApi_updateRunCountsByUser when @historicTotalRuns is updated (recalculates aggregate run counts)
EXEC HC.nonApi_updateRunCountsByUser when @historicHaring is updated (recalculates aggregate run counts — re-enabled in HC6)
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning

Never change the string values for @isMember ('yes'), @status ('member'), @emailAlerts ('on'/'off'/'auto'), @notifications ('on'/'off'/'auto'), @historicCountsAreEstimates ('yes'/'no') without updating all callers
Never change the '2999-12-31' never-expires sentinel date without updating all callers
